title: Words For Wednesday: Lovers
excerpt: I’ve been binge watching 30 Rock on Netflix (…again) and have been giggling at all Liz Lemon’s ridiculous sayings. That’s why I decided to make today’s Words For Wednesday a quote from the show!
content:
I’ve been binge watching 30 Rock on Netflix (…again) and have been giggling at all Liz Lemon’s ridiculous sayings. That’s why I decided to make today’s Words For Wednesday a quote from the show!

“Lovers. Oh… that word bums me out.

Unless it’s between the words meat and pizza.” ~Liz Lemon

Sometimes, you just need a silly quote in your life, right? If you’re a 30 Rock lover too, leave your favorite quote from the show below! Happy Wednesday. 🙂
